title: Redstone Tweaks Overlaid Gadget
description: An add-on package for Redstone Tweaks Overlaid
body:
original author：ZiYun
Add-on package author：w_y
Be sure to put it on top of Redstone Tweaks Overlaid!!!!
Be sure to put it on top of Redstone Tweaks Overlaid!!!!
Be sure to put it on top of Redstone Tweaks Overlaid!!!!
Redstone Tweaks Overlaid download link：[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ziyun-redstone-cover](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ziyun-redstone-cover)

1.Add has_record=true status to jukebox
2.The model of the open fence gate was changed to XK Highlight Block style
3.Observer model changed to look like the XK Redstone Display.
4.The model of the piston was changed to look like the XK Redstone Display.
5.Distinguish state 6 from 9 for redstone wires.
6.calibrated_sculk_sensor is now directionally distinguishable on the sides, back and bottom.
6.The dropper, dispenser and hopper point more obviously, cf. XK Redstone Display
7.sculk shrieker's can_summon=true status does the showing
8.The debug stick model was changed to a bedrock stick?
